name: @quoin/vocab-shadcn
description: shadcn/ui-flavoured primitives — command palette, scroll pane, hover card, popover, sheet overlay, tooltip.

attribution.harvestNotes: Maps shadcn/ui's distinctive overlay + command-menu patterns to Quoin primitives. Use alongside @quoin/vocab-editorial and @quoin/vocab-dashboard; this pack only adds primitives shadcn introduces beyond the v1 set.
